hero.status: Based in Montreal · Available for new projects
hero.title: Frontend & Shopify developer with agency experience, building custom storefronts, integrations, and web experiences.
hero.subtitle: I use code and no-code tools to build fast Shopify sites, custom features, integrations, and lightweight web experiences like one-page Next.js builds.

about.body:
I’m a web developer focused on building fast, clean digital experiences.

I studied psychology in the US, then moved to Montreal where I transitioned into web development and joined Field Office.

There, I worked on high-end marketing websites and Shopify projects as part of an agency team, mainly focused on frontend development, performance, and turning designs into production-ready websites.

Today, I work closely with designers, agencies, and teams to build reliable, well-crafted websites and applications with a strong attention to detail and clean code.

design.title: Design Implementation
design.body: I turn Figma designs into fully working Shopify themes. Clean, responsive, and built to match the design properly without cutting corners.

features.title: Custom Features & Integrations
features.body: Custom Shopify features, apps, and integrations. If Shopify doesn’t do it out of the box, I build it so it works for your setup.

step1.label: You tell me what you need
step1.subLabel: No need for a perfect brief. Just explain what you’re trying to build or fix.

step2.label: I define the scope
step2.subLabel: I’ll come back with a clear plan, timeline, and cost so everything is straightforward.

step3.label: We build it
step3.subLabel: I develop, test, and refine until it’s solid and ready for production.

pricing.title: Simple, flexible pricing
pricing.body: I usually work on a monthly retainer so things stay predictable and flexible on both sides.

contact.heading: Let’s talk
contact.body: If you need a developer for a Shopify project, custom feature, or ongoing work, feel free to reach out.
